title: Add sign-out controls for Internet Identity and credential admin sessions

requirements.summary: Add a “Sign out” control on /admin for Internet Identity-authenticated users that clears the Internet Identity session and admin-scoped cached data, returning to the Admin Access sign-in UI.
acceptanceCriteria: When an Internet Identity-authenticated user clicks “Sign out” on /admin, their session is cleared and the page returns to the “Admin Access” sign-in UI (the state where “Sign In with Internet Identity” is shown).
After signing out, admin-scoped React Query data is not shown for the previous identity, and admin status/leads queries re-run only after a new sign-in occurs.
User-facing button text is in English and clearly indicates signing out (e.g., “Sign out”).

file_operations.description: Add a visible “Sign out” control (use the shadcn-ui Button component to ensure consistent styling; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing) that is rendered when the user is authenticated via Internet Identity. Wire it to call the existing useInternetIdentity().clear() function from the page (do not modify useInternetIdentity.ts), then clear/invalidate React Query cached data related to admin (at minimum adminStatus/adminLeads/adminInitialized and any other identity-scoped queries) so prior identity data is not displayed after logout, and ensure the page returns to the Admin Access sign-in UI state.

requirements.summary: Add a “Sign out” control on /admin for credential-authenticated users that clears credential session state and admin-scoped cached data, returning to the sign-in options UI.
acceptanceCriteria: When a credential-authenticated user clicks “Sign out”, the UI returns to the sign-in options screen and no longer displays privileged/admin-only UI.
Credential state (username/password and error messages) is cleared after sign out.
Admin-scoped React Query data is invalidated/cleared so it does not remain visible after signing out.

file_operations.description: Implement credential-mode sign out behavior alongside the new Sign out control (use the shadcn-ui Button component; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing): when credential-authenticated, clicking “Sign out” must reset all credential session state (username/password values, credentialMode, credential error/loading flags, and isCredentialAuthenticated=false) and clear/invalidate admin-scoped React Query cache (at minimum adminStatus/adminLeads/adminInitialized for the credential-user key) so privileged UI and previous data are removed and the page returns to the Admin Access sign-in options screen.
